rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. In Past, Querent (29) shows where things already stand: your role and boundaries set the tone. Querent often points to your own stance toward the path, including how much of it is truly chosen and how much is inherited habit in your calling. In Present, Dog (18) becomes the pivot, so the theme that reliable support and trust become key turns into both pressure and opportunity. Here, Dog emphasizes steady support, loyal alliance, and the kind of dependable help that shows whether the path can actually hold in real life. Looking ahead, Future with Letter (27) points toward written clarity improves confidence, if the middle-card lesson is handled with care.
